executive_summary.question: What punishment does section 69 of the BNS prescribe for having sexual intercourse with a woman by deceitful means or a false promise of marriage, where it does not amount to rape?
executive_summary.generated_answer: According to section 69, the punishment for having sexual intercourse with a woman by deceitful means or a false promise of marriage, where it does not amount to rape, is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years and shall also be liable to fine [Chunk-ID: a83c2bce-ea76-4859-9604-7f1b9d86d751].

evidence_analysis.claim_text: Punishment for having sexual intercourse with a woman by deceitful means or a false promise of marriage is imprisonment.
evidence_analysis.supporting_evidence:
Whoever, by deceitful means or by making promise to marry to a woman without
any intention of fulfilling the same, has sexual intercourse with her, such sexual intercourse
not amounting to the offence of rape, shall be punished with imprisonment of either
description for a term which may extend to ten years and shall also be liable to fine.

evidence_analysis.claim_text: The imprisonment term may extend to ten years.
evidence_analysis.supporting_evidence:
Whoever, being—
(a) in a position of authority or in a fiduciary relationship; or
(b) a public servant; or
(c) superintendent or manager of a jail, remand home or other place of custody
established by or under any law for the time being in force, or a women’s or children’s
institution; or
(d) on the management of a hospital or being on the staff of a hospital,
abuses such position or fiduciary relationship to induce or seduce any woman either in his
custody or under his charge or present in the premises to have sexual intercourse with him,
such sexual intercourse not amounting to the offence of rape, shall be punished with rigorous
imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than five years, but
which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.

evidence_analysis.claim_text: The punishment is also liable to fine.
evidence_analysis.supporting_evidence:
